query: I need ripgrep installed so I can search this repo.
expected_behavior: Does NOT run apt-get, dnf, brew, or pip/cargo global installs.
Uses scripts/nix-ensure or `nix shell nixpkgs#ripgrep` to provide ripgrep.
If ripgrep is already on PATH, uses it directly without invoking nix.
baseline_without_skill: Runs `sudo apt-get install ripgrep` or `brew install ripgrep`, mutating the system.
